title: CLEO arm forensics
key_findings: Builder invoked only 7 distinct operation types (30 total calls); entire orchestrate domain (9 ops) was never touched
77% of the 453-second run had zero CLEO interaction — all code was written monolithically then tasks were batch-completed retroactively
The provenance bug (E_BRAIN_OBSERVE: no such column: provenance) caused complete BRAIN abandonment — 0 memory entries persisted
7 of 8 child tasks were completed without a prior cleo start call, violating BASE-005 and leaving session stats factually wrong (tasksCompleted: 0)
MANIFEST.jsonl was never appended (BASE-001 violation); orchestration miss was ~60% harness constraint (Agent tool unavailable) + ~40% CLEO discoverability gap

title: Programmatic acceptance-criteria gate architecture
schema_changes: zero new tables, zero new columns — reuses tasks.acceptance_json and lifecycle_gate_results
backward_compat: string[] remains valid; Task.acceptance widened to (string | AcceptanceGate)[]
key_findings: Current acceptance is free-text string[] with count-only enforcement (checkMin default 3); agent self-grades with zero runtime audit
Proposed AcceptanceGate discriminated union: test/file/command/lint/http/manual, each with optional req (REQ-ID) field for GSD-style addressability
lifecycle_gate_results table already exists and is the right home — just needs a structured producer
Three migration phases: add type → populate with cleo req migrate heuristic → enforce in cleo complete
Beats GSD REQ-ID-in-markdown on 10 axes: addressable, machine-verifiable, stale-detection, queryable, evidence-linked, composable, escape-hatch, re-spawn-on-fail, cheap-to-update, drift-resistant
Orchestrator IVTR loop gets REQ-ID-scoped fix-agent re-spawns instead of whole-task re-runs
Migration strategy is net-zero-breaking: one contract widening, two CLI render-site updates, rest is additive
risks: Q1-Q6 open questions for owner review documented in §13 (minCount semantics, --force friction, max-rounds alignment, manual-verdict scoping, phase-2 deadline, sha256 FileAssertion scope)
cleo complete mode flip from off→warn→block is behavioural change that must be coordinated with downstream subagent protocols

title: File attachment + llmtxt-core integration proposal
llmtxt_rationale: llmtxt-core and llmtxt npm are authored by the CLEO owner (kryptobaseddev); MIT-licensed; llmtxt peer-depends on @cleocode/lafs; crate provides SHA-256 + zlib + unified-diff + HMAC + signed-URL + progressive-disclosure + multi-way-diff + cherry-pick-merge primitives; adopt as dependency rather than wrap or build in-house
storage_model: content-addressed .cleo/attachments/sha256/<prefix>/<hash>.<ext> with SQLite index separate from tasks.db; ref-counted via junction table; never auto-GC
key_findings: Four disconnected attachment-shaped surfaces today: task.files (bare string[]), lifecycle_evidence (stage-scoped), CONDUIT attachments (Rust-side schema with ZERO TS/CLI surface), agent-outputs/ folder (convention not primitive)
CONDUIT attachment_versions + attachment_approvals + attachment_contributors tables exist in conduit.db but no cleo command writes or reads them — latent 93 lines of SQL
cleo research add --sources exists but accepts comma-separated URLs only; no content capture, no hash, no mime
llmtxt npm 2026.4.5 ships LocalBackend + RemoteBackend + multiWayDiff + cherryPickMerge — exactly the primitives the llmtxt.my SITREP (2026-04-11) flagged as missing server-side
llms.txt spec (llmstxt.org) and llmtxt-core are distinct: spec is a wire format for site indexing; llmtxt-core is a content-primitives crate
Adopt llmtxt as dep; phased 4-release roll-out v2026.4.66-69
Directly closes Pomodoro SUPREME_REPORT §7 gap: 'no task-scoped research note; you can find patterns but can't attach a pre-build research summary to an epic'
integration_points: T763 programmatic gates: attachment + attachment-label gate kinds
CONDUIT: existing attachment_versions/_approvals/_contributors tables become backing store for llmtxt-doc kind

summary: AcceptanceGate discriminated union + Zod schemas added to packages/contracts. 6 gate variants (test/file/command/lint/http/manual), 8 FileAssertion variants, AcceptanceGateResult type. 44 new round-trip tests. Build and tests pass (45/45).
Added --history flag to cleo show surfacing lifecycle_stages as history array in JSON envelope. taskShowWithHistory engine function + CLI --history option. Graceful empty array when no pipeline.

Resolver audit confirmed all 6 memory code paths use resolveAnthropicApiKey() not raw env. Fixed 7 misleading JSDoc comments. Added resolveAnthropicApiKeySource() to resolver + internal.ts exports. Added cleo memory llm-status command via dispatch handler + registry + CLI. 14 new tests pass.
